Revenue-related label, but appears to be a component rather than the main top-line total.

candidates.why: Not revenue; cost-related depreciation line.
COGS line, not revenue.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label and best semantic match for direct production/service costs.
Also a valid COGS label, but less preferred than the more standard direct label.

candidates.why: Overhead-related selling/distribution expense, but appears to include depreciation and has a more granular component row below.
Overhead-related admin expense, but appears to include depreciation and has a more granular component row below.
Clean overhead component and preferable to the broader admin subtotal.
Explicit D&A in SG&A and should be excluded from XSGA per rules.

variables.notes: Used one row outside the candidate list because the preview shows a better selling overhead component: 'Distribution Costs' is the non-D&A component underlying 'Distribution and Selling Expenses'. Also selected 'Administrative Expenses' instead of broader 'Administration Expenses' to exclude the separate 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' rows, which must not be included in XSGA. No dedicated R&D line is present. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution Costs
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense bucket; usable fallback if no direct interest expense line is available.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line and best match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense subtype; useful secondary fallback.
Other finance expense, less precise than direct interest expense.
Generic other finance expense; low precision.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-liability interest; less preferred than primary statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list: direct interest expense first, then lease-liability interest, then broader financial expense as fallback.

candidates.why: Best equity line here because minority interest is reported separately and total equity plus minority interest is shown separately.
This is minority interest, not parent/common book equity.
Includes minority interest and would double count if MIB is also mapped separately.
Balancing line, not preferred over reported equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total Equity because minority interest is separately disclosed and Total Equity & Minority Interest is provided as a separate combined line.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution item, not the preferred balance sheet stock measure.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line.
Direct balance sheet minority interest line and simplest preferred label.
Income statement attribution item, less appropriate than balance sheet minority equity.
